sections.paragraph:
συμφωνέω [σύν, φωνέω] in ext. imagery of harmonious sounds

—1. ‘fit together’, match, of compatibility of cloth Lk 5:36; of prophetic words agree Ac 15:15.

—2. in the cognitive sphere ‘have a meeting of minds’, agree Mt 18:19; τί ὅτι συνεφωνήϑη ὑμῖν why was it agreed by you two Ac 5:9; of a bargaining session, reach agreement Mt 20:2, 13.
